title: wedelia pertenuis
intro: Wedelia pertenuis, also known as the narrow leaf wedelia or daisy tansy, is a flowering plant species native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Wedelia pertenuis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Wedelia pertenuis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
